description: Lightweight web scraper using HTTP requests and Cheerio. Fast HTML parsing without browser overhead. | 轻量级网页爬虫，使用 HTTP 请求和 Cheerio，无需浏览器，速度更快。

properties.title: 起始 URL | Start URLs
properties.name: startUrls
properties.description: URLs to start crawling from | 开始爬取的 URL 列表

properties.title: 链接选择器 | Link Selector
properties.name: linkSelector
properties.description: CSS selector for finding links to crawl (e.g., 'a[href]'). Leave empty to disable link discovery. | 用于发现链接的 CSS 选择器，留空禁用链接发现

properties.title: 最大爬取深度 | Max Depth
properties.name: maxCrawlingDepth
properties.description: Maximum crawl depth from start URLs (0 = start page only). | 最大爬取深度（0 = 仅起始页）

properties.title: 最大页面数 | Max Pages
properties.name: maxPagesPerCrawl
properties.description: Maximum pages to crawl (0 = unlimited). | 最大爬取页面数（0 = 不限制）

properties.title: 最大并发数 | Max Concurrency
properties.name: maxConcurrency
properties.description: Maximum concurrent requests. | 最大并发请求数

properties.title: 请求超时(秒) | Request Timeout (secs)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds. | HTTP 请求超时时间（秒）

properties.title: 最大重试次数 | Max Retries
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: Maximum retries for failed requests. | 失败请求的最大重试次数

properties.title: 忽略 SSL 错误 | Ignore SSL Errors
properties.name: ignoreSslErrors
properties.description: Ignore SSL certificate errors. | 忽略 SSL 证书错误

properties.title: User-Agent
properties.name: userAgent
properties.description: Custom User-Agent header. | 自定义 User-Agent

properties.title: 请求延迟(ms) | Request Delay (ms)
properties.name: requestDelayMs
properties.description: Delay between requests in milliseconds. | 请求之间的延迟（毫秒）

properties.title: 调试日志 | Debug Log
properties.name: debugLog
properties.description: Enable detailed debug logging. | 启用详细调试日志
